message:
fix(bracket): replace unreachable panic with typed PolledAfterCompletion error

Bracket's Done state used unreachable!() which panics on repoll. Replace
with BracketError::PolledAfterCompletion for fail-closed semantics
consistent with Fold, TryFold, and other futures in the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
